_comment: MPP MMD_REPORT template — fill in all sections before Stage 3 runs.

gaps.description: What assumption is being made but not stated?
gaps.resolution: How is this gap closed? (Required for HIGH severity)

edge_cases.input: What specific input triggers this edge case?
edge_cases.expected_behavior: What should the system do with this input?
Should raise ValueError with message explaining what was expected.

edge_cases.input: Input at exact boundary of accepted range
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Should be accepted and produce the documented boundary behavior.

failure_modes.name: MISSING_REQUIRED_INPUT
failure_modes.trigger: A required argument or file is absent

failure_modes.name: SCHEMA_VIOLATION
failure_modes.trigger: Input does not match declared schema

integration_points.contract: What we expect from this touch point (inputs accepted, outputs returned, side effects)
